missions.title: First Launch
missions.description: Build a basic sounding rocket that can safely reach the sky and land with a parachute.

missions.title: Camera Flight
missions.description: Add a camera pod so your rocket can film its own flight.

missions.title: Payload Mission
missions.description: Carry a small science payload safely to the sky and back.

missions.title: Orbital Attempt
missions.description: Design a two-stage orbital rocket with guidance and enough thrust to reach orbit.

missions.title: Satellite Delivery
missions.description: Build an orbital rocket that can power and deliver a small satellite with solar panels.
